Uses of Class
com.google.cloud.pubsublite.Message.Builder

  • Packages that use Message.Builder 
    Package Description
    com.google.cloud.pubsublite  

    • Uses of Message.Builder in com.google.cloud.pubsublite

      Methods in com.google.cloud.pubsublite that return Message.Builder 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static Message.Builder Message.builder()
      Get a new builder for a message.
      abstract Message.Builder Message.Builder.setAttributes(com.google.common.collect.ImmutableListMultimap<String,com.google.protobuf.ByteString> attributes)
      A multimap of attributes for this message.
      abstract Message.Builder Message.Builder.setData(com.google.protobuf.ByteString data)
      The data payload for this message.
      abstract Message.Builder Message.Builder.setEventTime(com.google.protobuf.Timestamp eventTime)
      The user provided event time for this message.
      abstract Message.Builder Message.Builder.setKey(com.google.protobuf.ByteString key)
      The key for this message.
      abstract Message.Builder Message.toBuilder()
      Convert an existing message to a builder.
